caption: The video appears to be a thermal or night-vision footage, likely captured by a military drone or aircraft. It shows a dramatic scene of an explosion or fire on the ground, with thick smoke rising into the sky. The crosshairs in the center suggest that the footage is being used for targeting or surveillance purposes. The logos and text in the corners indicate that this is from a Ukrainian intelligence source, specifically the "Головне управління розвідки" (Main Intelligence Directorate) and "GROUP 13." The intensity of the smoke and the bright light sources suggest significant destruction or combat activity occurring below. The overall atmosphere is tense and urgent, indicative of a high-stakes military operation or conflict.
